questions.question: What does Jesus say the church in Ephesus has forsaken?
questions.feedback: Jesus says the Ephesians have forsaken the love they had at first.

questions.question: Which church does Jesus say is about to suffer persecution and be tested for ten days?
questions.feedback: Jesus warns Smyrna of ten days of persecution.

questions.question: Jesus praises the church in Pergamum for living where Satan has his throne.
questions.feedback: Jesus acknowledges they live where Satan has his throne yet remain faithful.

questions.question: To the one who is victorious Jesus will give the right to eat from the tree of _____.
questions.feedback: The victorious will eat from the tree of life in the paradise of God.

questions.question: Be faithful even to the point of death, and I will give you the _____ of life.
questions.feedback: Be faithful unto death and receive the crown of life.
